Ardougne Sewers mine.location: The middle of [[Ardougne Sewers]] ([[Ardougne Sewers#Eastern Ardougne Sewers|Eastern Sewers]])

Bandit Camp mine.location: North-east of [[Bandit Camp (Wilderness)|Bandit Camp]], east of [[Wilderness God Wars Dungeon]]

Citharede Abbey mine.location: East of [[Al Kharid]], near the [[Citharede Abbey|abbey]]

Coal Trucks.location: North of the [[Fishing Guild]], west of [[McGrubor's Wood]]

Dwarven Mine.location: Entrances at north-east [[Falador]], [[Mining Guild]], and north-west of [[Barbarian Village]]

Isle of Souls mine.location: South of the [[Soul Wars Lobby]], [[Isle of Souls]]

Jatizso mine.location: Entrance by the north wall of [[Jatizso]]

Karamja Jungle mine.location: North of [[Shilo Village (location)|Shilo Village]] by [[Nature Altar]]

Kebos Lowlands mine.location: North-west of [[Kebos Swamp]], south of the [[Farming Guild]].

Limestone Mine.location: By the [[Rag and Bone Man I]], west of the [[Paterdomus]]

North Mor Ul Rek mine.location: South-west of TzHaar entrance, south-east of TzHaar bank.

South Brimhaven mine.location: South-west of Brimhaven, by the entrance to [[Brimhaven Dungeon]]

South Mor Ul Rek mine.location: Southernmost part of Mor Ul Rek

South Wilderness mine.location: At the point where the [[River Lum]] enters a tunnel

South-west Varrock mine.location: West of [[Varrock]]'s south entrance, near the [[Champions' Guild]].
